race.description: All Too Hard @ Vinery Stud Handicap
race.comment: SHE'S EXTRA (6) was ultra-impressive on debut last start at Newcastle over 900m, rolling along in front then booting right away in the run home. Has an extra furlong to travel today but there were no signs of weakness last start. Stick with her. COCO AFFAIR (7) debuts for O'Shea/Charlton on the back of three strong trial wins since mid-January. Clearly has talent so a big introduction to racing will not surprise. Pinatubo filly PROMENADE (9) won a Randwick trial on 19 February and looks ready to run well on debut for Michael Freedman. HANDLOOM (11) contested the Gimcrack five months ago and finished down the track at big odds. Lines up for the first time since that run. Sure to be way more competitive at this level. Waller's first starter MILELE (4) hasn't shown much at the trials but any positive move in betting must be respected.
